refine.warning.unsavedChangesMsg: You have unsaved changes in the current session. If you load a new file, these changes will be lost. Do you want to proceed?
refine.dropzone.title: Drag your flashcard file here
refine.dropzone.desc: Supports Anki packages (.apkg) or tab-separated values (.tsv) exported from Vesta or other tools.
refine.notesPlaceholder: Write useful information, translations, grammar notes, and etymology here...
refine.notesPlaceholderGenerating: AI is generating notes for this card...
refine.notesPlaceholderEmpty: Load a deck to start editing notes...
refine.llm.promptPlaceholder: Explain the most difficult words by providing etymology and examples...
refine.progress.title: Automatic Processing
refine.log.title: Processing Log
refine.log.empty: Logs will be displayed here upon start...
refine.action.tooltipOverwrite: Overwrite the original file with your current changes
refine.action.tooltipSaveAsApkg: Save the current deck as an Anki package (.apkg)
refine.action.tooltipSaveAsTsv: Export the current deck as a tab-separated text file (.tsv)
refine.msg.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported file format. Drag only .apkg or .tsv files.
